title: Foggy Wilds
description: A lightweight horror themed modpack, with the visuals of old Minecraft.
body:
**Foggy Wilds** is a lightweight horror themed modpack built to emulate beta Minecraft. With new entities that roam the thick fogs of your world. 

![An early morning screenshot showing the silhouette of a few trees in thick fog. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aae59e7b57dba0c411c85f5cfaa9df941802d585_0.webp)

This modpack is very lightweight in content and should be able to run comfortably on most PCs. It runs on version 1.20.1 but has changes to make it look and feel a bit more like Beta Minecraft. Old textures and combat, true darkness, and no more hunger.

As for the horrors this pack includes: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[Box of Horrors](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-box-of-horrors/version/0.0.8.6), [The Anomaly](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-anomaly/version/2.1.0) & [From the Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog/version/1.9.2)

</details>
